titleStmt.title: SII 23.271: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 271. (A.R. No. 271 of 1907.) Tiruviḍaimarudūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Mahāliṅgasvāmi temple—on the west wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine Vīrapratāpa Achyutadēva-Mahārāya: Śaka 1456 expired: 1534-35 A.D.

summary.p: The details of the date are given as Jaya, Tulā, śu. 2, Friday, Viśākhā, which would correspond to A.D. 1534, October 9.

This is a damaged inscription written in faulty language. This seems to register a sale of land and house sites by the Śrīpaṇḍārattār of the temple, to a certain Rāmappa-Nāyaka son of Vasavaṇa-Nāyakar of Aṇṇal-Ēndal in Tiruvaṇṇāmalai Dēvamaṇḍala-śīrmai effected at the latter's request for 60 paṇam, for the purpose of a Śubhakshaya, by which is probably meant Śubha-sthala (a hall in which sacrifices are performed).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmaṉmahāmaṇḍaleśvaran hariyarāyakhibhāṭan bhāṣaikkuttakhakhuvarāyar kaṇḍan
mūvarāyarakaṇṭan kaṇṭanāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭanāṭu kuṭātāṉ pūrve dakṣiṇavaścimottara catusamudrādhipati śrīvi
rapratāpa Āccutadevamahārāyar pṛthvirājyam vaṇṇiāruḷāniṉṟa śakā bdam 1000 4 100 5 10 6 Itiṉmel melcellāniṉṟa
jayasamvatsarattu tulānāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu dvitiyaiyum śukravāramum bālavakaraṇamum peṟṟa viśākanakṣadrattu nāḷ
coḻamaṇṭala kāveri Āṟṟukku terkku Uyyakkoṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭu tiraimūrnāṭṭu nayiṉār tiruviṭaimarutūruṭaiya tampirāṉār śrī paṇṭārattārom tiru
vaṇṇāmalai tevamaṇṭalacirmai Aṇṇal Ental goḷa vasavaṇa nāyakkar khutraṉ rāmappa nāyakkarukku śubhakṣayadhārā pūrvasādha nam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi Inta
bojananātaṉ(?) sanniyile va[sava]ṇṇāyakarukku puṇṇiyamāka Oru grāmam paṇṇaveṇum Eṅkaḷai Ellārem keḻkkayile Atukku nāṅkaḷ Ellārum śupakṣayadhārāpūrvam
paṇṇikuṭuttapaṭi tirukuḷattu vaṭakku maṭattukku meṟkku ttampirāṉ tiruviti teṉciṟaku meṟkkaṭai talaimāṭukku terkku ṇamār teruvukku meṟku Inta nāṉku Ellaikku Uḷpaṭṭa nilam
Uḷḷatu ppamaṭu niṅkalāka Uḷḷa maṉaikku Uḷppaṭṭa māvaṭai mara vaṭai nidhinikṣepajalapāṣaṇādyaṣṭabhogatejasvāmyaṅkaḷum Uḷpaṭa viṟpputāka ma yeścānalitakā�
citamūlam �100 6 10 In=tapaṇam ṉūṟṟu Aṟupatum śupakṣayamāka paṟṟikkoṇṭu rāmappanāyakkarkku śrītan [?] dharmmarājā kaiyile vasavaṇṇāyakkapuram Eṉṟu dhāraivāttukku
ṭuttom Inta dharmmarājā yam dānādhivinimayavikrayaṅkaḷukkum yogya māka naṭattikkoḷḷakaṭavomaākavum Iṉta gāmam maṉai Irupattu Añcu Inta �100 6 10
Orukippaṭi kku Ituve poruḷ māvaṟuti poruḷ cilavolai Aṟu Āka koḷḷavum Itu Allatu poruḷ māvaṟuti poruḷcila volai kāṭṭu Eṉṟu colla
kaṭavatallā yasādhanattukku Ōlai Eḻuttu vācaka piḻai varimāṉāṭṭa ṟamum kuṟṟam Eṉṟu collakaṭavatallavākavum kku kiḻakkumaṉai muṉṟukku �3
tāruṇa tiramam Oṉpatukku Ippaṭikku Oru kālāvatu Iru kālāvatu mukkālāvatu vilaikku viṟṟu poruḷk kaikoṇṭuviṟṟu vilai piramāṇam pa
ṇṇik kuṭuttom rāmappa nāyakkar tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiya tampirāṉār śrīpaṇṭā kulacekarabrahmādhirāyaṉ Eḻuttu caṅkaratevaṉ Eḻuttu nāṟppattu Eṇṇāyiravaṉ Eḻuttu tirucciṟṟam
Eḻuttu piḻai Ellā Eḻuttu r Eḻuttu paṭṭar Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 23.271 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
